chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-31 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 97/22 3.For hearing of main case 02-09-2025 Petitioner is called absent. **** Petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, is called absent; no intimation is received so far. This matter was lastly fixed on 11.01.2022, when following order was passed: “Petitioner is directed to come prepared and satisfy as to how this petition is maintainable as firstly, he is not an aggrieved person, and secondly, earlier he had also filed C.P.No.D-380 of 2021 against the same Respondent, which is already pending. Adjourned”. Thereafter, no efforts were made by the petitioner to have the matter fixed in Court, which reflects that the petitioner has lost his interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
